MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-23-2017 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-29-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DISCOVERY 302, DISCOVERY 302,PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC'S MOTION FOR ORDER DEEMING ADMISSION IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED; ACCORDINGLY, DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO SERVE WITHIN TEN (10) DAYS WITHOUT OBJECTION CODE COMPLIANT RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ADMISSION. IF SUCH RESPONSES ARE NOT SERVED WITHIN TEN DAYS, ALL REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION WILL BE DEEMED TO HAVE BEEN ADMITTED AND DEFENDANT WILL BE BARRED FROM PRESENTING ANY EVIDENCE TO THE CONTRARY. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF IS DIRECTED TO SUBMIT A [PROPOSED] WRITTEN ORDER THAT TRACKS THE COURT'S RULING, VERBATIM. THE [PROPOSED] ORDER SHALL BE EMAILED IN WORD (.DOC) FORMAT DIRECTLY TO JUDGE PRO TEM PAUL RENNE AT RENNEPAR85@GMAIL.COM.JUDGE PRO TEM: PAUL A. RENNE; CLERK: J. RIOS MERIDA; NOT REPORTED. (D302)

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-16-2019 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-27-2017 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Oct-29-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion For Order Deeming Admission
Off Calendar Oct-23-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC's Motion For Order Deeming Admission is GRANTED. No opposition has been filed; accordingly, defendant is ordered to serve within ten (10) days without objection code compliant responses to plaintiff's request for admission. If such responses are not served within ten days, all requests for admission will be deemed to have been admitted and defendant will be barred from presenting any evidence to the contrary. Counsel for plaintiff is directed to submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim. The [proposed] order shall be emailed in Word (.doc) format directly to Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne at rennepar85@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul A. Renne; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-14-2017 Set For Trial On Nov-27-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
